name: Charles Hollins
title: Founder
bio: Charles Hollins is the founder and lead AI consultant at Digital Mixology, a company based in Los Angeles, California, that specializes in online media. With a strong background in digital strategy, content management, and analytics, Hollins leverages his expertise to enhance digital entertainment and e-learning experiences. His extensive skill set includes A/B testing, agile methodologies, and user experience design, which are crucial in the rapidly evolving online media landscape. Notably, the online media industry is increasingly focusing on integrating AI technologies to optimize content delivery and user engagement, positioning companies like Digital Mixology at the forefront of this transformation.
